tipos cosas ejemplo nadar delfines tomarte fotos parque espectacular 100 recomendado opinion gusta ir familia pareja excelente it s very large park to get there you must pay an entrance fee there are many places where you can buy tickets buses usually pick up tourists at their hotels and take them to the park upon entering they should give you wristband and give you the option to take unlimited photos throughout the park at specific points with the attendants for 70 i recommend this option especially if you re traveling with large family there are approximately four restaurants serving different types of food when i went i could eat breakfast at any restaurant and eat as many times as i wanted for lunch it was the same i could eat at any restaurant and eat as many times as i wanted without having to leave the food is delicious and you can help yourself to whatever you like best there are many types of food to choose from inside the park you can do many things it s divided into modules such as the lighthouse viewing platform and the slide most modules have bathrooms and you can ask for life jackets fins and mask to get into the water and the cenotes everything is very organized and adapted for large crowds there s another module where you can take bike and ride for approximately 8 minutes to reach hill where you can float through the cenotes there s dolphin watching in the park and you can swim with rays and fish you won t have enough time to explore the entire park in one day and enjoy everything it to offer you can also pay for other things such as swimming with the dolphins and taking photos with them it s spectacular park 100 recommended and in my opinion it s my favorite it s excellent for going with family or as couple
